title: RocketLauncher
description: Adds a new enchantment for the crossbow that makes you fly through the air when you fire a rocket of any level.
body:
Adds a new enchantment for the crossbow that makes you fly through the air when you fire a rocket of any level. This is not a pyrotechnic rocket, just a firework. If you shoot forward, it will work normally.

[![<Sparked Host>](<https://i.imgur.com/6DVHtNL.png>)](<https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3123>)
